task.role: You are a Senior Mobile Engineer with expertise in React Native and cross-platform development. Implement Task 11 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Complete mobile app with integrations view, settings, and profile screens
context.background: This task is part of a larger project. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.txt (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: 10 - Infrastructure config: Check ConfigMaps for connection strings

requirements.description: Settings persistence, notification preferences, dark mode, profile management, NativeWind styling.

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-11): Mobile App Settings & Profile (Tap - Expo)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
Test settings persistence, preference sync, logout flow

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
